name: Robin DL7F Wash
comment: Adjust seven colours, individually, to give unprecedented smooth, stable and even colour mixing and a very high CRI of 90 to meet the high standards of your applications.

capabilities.comment: Theatre mode - fan noise control from min to max
Colour mixing mode 7 colours On (mode 3 and 4 only)
Colour mixing mode 7 colours Off (mode 3 and 4 only)
Output uniformity On ( at selected CRI - (DMX values 151 - 155))
Filter 281 (Three Quarter CT Blue) (Three Quarter CT Blue)
Filter 285 (Three Quarter CT Orange) (Three Quarter CT Orange)
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
White Point Off (CTC+Green Cor+Virtual ColWheel deactivated)
Crossfade (crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix)
Random strobe from slow to fast

gwSpecs.description: Adjust seven colours, individually, to give unprecedented smooth, stable and even colour mixing and a very high CRI of 90 to meet the high standards of your applications.
